keyFactors: Iran has a higher elo rating and better weighted form over the last two years.
Iran averages more goals scored per match compared to New Zealand.
New Zealand has not played a match in 193 days, potentially affecting match sharpness.
The match is played at a neutral venue, removing any home advantage.
risks: Both teams have an identical recent form of 1.9, suggesting New Zealand could perform better than their weighted form indicates.
Iran has not played a match in 60 days, which might impact their rhythm slightly.

prediction.rationale: Beide Modelle sind sich weitgehend einig. Ausschlaggebend: Iran hat höheres Elo (1690 vs 1625) und stärkere gewichtete Form (1.81 vs 1.24); Iran mit besserer Offensive (2.27 Tore/Spiel) und solider Defensive (0.91 Gegentore, 46% Clean Sheets); Neuseeland mit langer Wettkampfpause (193 Tage seit letztem Spiel) - mögliche Rhythmusprobleme.
